templates.title: Neopets
templates.description: Toronto Adopt-A-Pet (fictional) — Scrapbook-soft nonprofit demo with rescue alerts, explorer cards, quests, and lost-and-found — playful Neopets-era energy, all fictional Toronto shelter copy.

templates.title: TMNT
templates.description: Tactical turf & patch crew (fictional) — Six emerald-tinted routes from home base to contact — walk the walk through comic panels, faux project logs, and mission chatter that is all hat and no cattle (demo turf, not a real yard).

templates.title: LooneyTunes
templates.description: Comic-brutalist cafe shop (fictional) — MongoDB-backed drink retail demo — comic-brutalist shop, menu catalog from looney_tunes, client cart, checkout, rewards login, and admin browse; all placeholder copy.

templates.title: Party Board
templates.description: Smile Board Family Dental (fictional) — Eight-route family dental demo — board-game journey home, dentist tiles, service cards, forms hub, testimonials, FAQ accordion, and multi-step booking flow; playful N64-party energy without licensed assets.

templates.title: Companion
templates.description: Premium pet supply ecosystem (fictional) — Six-route premium pet retail demo — live MongoDB shop, rewards login, guest checkout with 15-minute holds, and order confirmation.

templates.title: Pawsome

templates.title: Arcade
templates.description: Industrial command deck (fictional) — Seven routes from command home to contact — CRT chrome, mission cards, services hub with FAQ, stage-select portfolio filters, reputation leaderboard, and mission log about page; demo brand Arcade Trades, Toronto placeholder copy only.

templates.title: EverGreen
templates.description: Year-round property stewardship (fictional) — Premium landscaping demo — split-image hero, seasonal command overview, four-season journey centerpiece, challenge cards, masonry portfolio, dark winter section, process roadmap, testimonials, service map, and closing CTA; homeowner-focused, not generic contractor.

templates.title: Lumina Landscapes
templates.description: Landscape architecture studio (fictional) — Single-page premium landscape studio demo — cinematic outdoor retreats, blueprint design process, material library, resort experiences, case-study portfolio, and consultation intake; all placeholder copy.

templates.description: Premium pet adoption matching (fictional) — Single-page pet adoption demo — compatibility matching hero, filterable adoptable pets, adoption journey timeline, rescue story, volunteer board, donation pantry, storybook success stories, FAQ, and pet profile modal; all placeholder copy.

templates.title: LUXE & CO.
templates.description: Premium real estate concierge (fictional) — Single-page premium real estate demo — editorial hero, lifestyle matching, neighborhood city guide, curated property collection, market intelligence, buyer/seller roadmap, and story-based testimonials; all placeholder copy.

templates.title: Liquid Occasions
templates.description: Premium event planning studio (fictional) — Five-route premium event planning demo — dream hero with circular clusters, liquid path milestones, multi-step journey intake, experience showcases, portfolio case studies, and five-stage process timeline; MD3 palette with yellow path motif; all placeholder copy.

templates.title: Kinship & Capital
templates.description: Heritage Financial family wealth (fictional) — Six-route premium family wealth demo — home, services marketplace, pricing tiers, FAQ accordion, about story, and contact consultation form; MD3 blue palette with concierge financial copy; all placeholder.

templates.description: Toronto digital craftsman (fictional) — Five-route ethereal portfolio demo — home hero with cloud motifs, skills bento grid, education timeline, agency experience journey, and contact form with Toronto map; sky-blue MD3 palette; all placeholder copy.
